rows.source_ref: gftcfd, 'Heiken-Ashi System + Moving Average + Fractals', ForexFactory forum thread 374526 (5 posts, year n/a), https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/374526
rows.concept: Trend-following breakout that enters on a Heiken-Ashi Smoothed color-flip confirmed by close above the LWMA(24), triggered by a stop order parked at the last fractal level.
rows.eligibility_reason: Long side fully specified with standard MQL5 indicators (HA Smoothed 2,6,3,2; LWMA24 on HL/2; Fractals), deterministic entry/exit with SL+TP; GBPJPY H1 data available via .DWX.
rows.notes: JPY-cross fits the desired uncorrelated-driver bucket, but this is a generic trend indicator mashup with only screenshot evidence (no backtest), anonymous single-poster thread. Ambiguities to resolve before build: sell side only implied by an example (author says 'here is a sell order example') not written out - assume symmetric; '+0.2 / -0.2' TP/SL offset units unstated (likely 20 pips on GBPJPY); HA Smoothed repaint/lag risk. Entry: HA color sequence red-blue-blue AND prev close > MA -> stop-buy at last fractal; TP = fractal + 0.2; SL = prev MA - 0.2; author cancels order if HA color changes before fill.
